title: System overview
summary: The big picture: who talks to what. Visitors read quotes; admins manage the library behind an edge auth gate; developers ship through a PR → CI → merge → Vercel pipeline.

steps.label: Browse
steps.note: Anonymous visitor loads the landing page.

steps.label: Hydrate
steps.note: Server Component passes categories prop to the client component.

steps.label: Generate
steps.note: Client click → fetch a random quote.

steps.label: List categories
steps.note: Distinct categories for the pill bar.

steps.label: Random pick
steps.note: Count + offset select for a random row.

steps.label: SQL (WebSocket)
steps.note: All queries flow through the Neon serverless adapter.

steps.label: Sign in
steps.note: Admin submits the password form.

steps.label: Set cookie
steps.note: Server Action sets httpOnly admin_session=1 and redirects to /admin.

steps.label: Visit /admin/*
steps.note: Every admin request hits the edge gate first.

steps.label: Redirect if no cookie
steps.note: Unauthenticated visitors are bounced to /login.

steps.label: Forward if cookie ok
steps.note: Returning nothing from proxy() lets the request pass through.

steps.label: Add
steps.note: Link from the list view.

steps.label: Edit
steps.note: Per-row Edit link.

steps.label: List + delete
steps.note: findMany on render; deleteQuote Server Action on click.

steps.label: Insert
steps.note: prisma.quote.create on form submit.

steps.label: Update
steps.note: prisma.quote.update on form submit.

steps.label: Sign out
steps.note: POST /logout deletes the cookie.

steps.label: Push + PR
steps.note: Branch protection blocks direct push to main.

steps.label: Trigger CI
steps.note: Workflow runs on every PR and on push to main.

steps.label: Green check unlocks merge
steps.note: Branch protection requires the check job to pass.

steps.label: Deploy on main
steps.note: Vercel auto-builds and atomically deploys on main update.

steps.label: Serves edge + app
steps.note: Vercel hosts the proxy and the Next.js app.
